title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Netsol Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Netsol Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the Netsol Technologies family as a Frontend Developer in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Netsol Technologies:
Netsol Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies!
